title: biscutella flexuosa
intro: Biscutella flexuosa, also known as the alpine biscutella, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Biscutella flexuosa can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in some traditional remedies, but its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
